# Construction Schedule

## Timeline: March 2026 — October 2026 (8 months)

Schedule prepared by Jim Patterson, Lone Star Builders. Updated April 3, 2026.

## Phase 1: Site Work & Foundation (March 1 — March 28)

- **March 1-5**: Site clearing, tree protection fencing around heritage oaks, temporary utilities
- **March 6-8**: Excavation and grading (completed by Ace Earthworks)
- **March 9-11**: Plumbing rough-in under slab (sewer, water supply stubs)
- **March 12**: Foundation inspection by Maria Rodriguez — **PASSED**
- **March 13-15**: Post-tension cable layout and slab pour
- **March 16-28**: Cure time (minimum 7 days), then cable stressing by foundation engineer

## Phase 2: Framing (March 29 — May 2)

- **March 29 — April 11**: First floor wall framing and floor system for second story
- **April 12-25**: Second floor framing and roof trusses
- **April 22**: Framing inspection by Maria Rodriguez (scheduled)
- **April 26 — May 2**: Sheathing, house wrap (Tyvek DrainWrap), window/door rough openings

## Phase 3: Mechanical Rough-In (May 3 — May 30)

- **May 3-14**: Electrical rough-in (Bright Spark Electric, Tom Chen)
- **May 5-16**: Plumbing rough-in (runs concurrently with electrical on opposite zones)
- **May 17-28**: HVAC ductwork and equipment placement (Comfort Air Solutions, Sarah Kim)
- **May 29-30**: Mechanical inspections (electrical, plumbing, HVAC)

## Phase 4: Enclosure (June 1 — June 30)

- **June 1-12**: Roofing — standing seam metal installation
- **June 13-20**: Window and exterior door installation
- **June 21-30**: Exterior stone veneer and siding

## Phase 5: Interior Finish (July 1 — September 15)

- **July 1-7**: Spray foam insulation
- **July 8-21**: Drywall hang, tape, and finish
- **July 22 — August 5**: Interior painting
- **August 6-20**: Flooring installation (hardwood main areas, tile bathrooms)
- **August 21 — September 5**: Cabinetry and countertop installation
- **September 6-15**: Electrical and plumbing trim-out (fixtures, outlets, switches)

## Phase 6: Final (September 16 — October 15)

- **September 16-25**: Landscaping and exterior finish
- **September 26-30**: Final inspections and punch list
- **October 1-10**: Punch list remediation
- **October 15**: Certificate of Occupancy target date

## Dependencies

- Framing cannot begin until foundation is stressed and approved
- Roofing must be complete before spray foam insulation
- Drywall cannot start until all mechanical inspections pass
- Flooring after painting to avoid damage
